Sim-universe-claim: across 15-substrate enum {Akida, GPU, IonQ, QuEra, FinalSpark, Lightmatter, IBM-Q, ...}, each substrate driven into glassy regime via random-bond H_J Hamiltonian must produce P(q) with substrate-canonical ultrametricity statistic. six_new_paradigm_v15_axes_sim_universe_l.ordinal_strength_independent_claim: Kitaev surface-code + threshold theorem: there exists p* > 0 such that for p < p*, logical error rate p_L ~ (p/p*)^{(d+1)/2}.
